name: IRC_ERROR_TRACKING
description: Table for tracking errors across recruiting.

columns.Name: ERROR_TRACKING_ID
columns.Comments: System generated primary key for this entity.

columns.Name: ERR_EXTRA_INFO1
columns.Comments: Attribute to store additional information.

columns.Name: ERR_EXTRA_INFO2
columns.Comments: Attribute to store additional information.

columns.Name: ERR_EXTRA_INFO3
columns.Comments: Attribute to store additional information.

columns.Name: ERR_EXTRA_INFO4
columns.Comments: Attribute to store additional information.

columns.Name: ERR_EXTRA_INFO5
columns.Comments: Attribute to store additional information.

columns.Name: ERR_EXTRA_INFO6
columns.Comments: Attribute to store additional information.

columns.Name: ERR_EXTRA_INFO7
columns.Comments: Attribute to store additional information.

columns.Name: OBJECT_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores object type code for the error. Example IRC_OFFERS.

columns.Name: OBJECT_ID
columns.Comments: Stores object Id for the error. Example OFFER_ID.

columns.Name: MODULE_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores module code for the error. Example IRC.

columns.Name: MESSAGE_TEXT
columns.Comments: Stores message text for the error.

columns.Name: MESSAGE_CATEGORY
columns.Comments: Stores message category for the error.

columns.Name: ERROR_STACK
columns.Comments: Stores error stack of the error.

columns.Name: ERROR_MESSAGE_TYPE
columns.Comments: Stores Error message type - Error or Warning.

columns.Name: ERROR_MESSAGE_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores Error message code from the resource bundle or fnd messages.

columns.Name: ERROR_MESSAGE_TOKENS
columns.Comments: Stores tokens used for the Error message.

columns.Name: OCCURANCE_DATE
columns.Comments: OCCURANCE_DATE

columns.Name: STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores status code of the error. Example ORA_ACTIVE, ORA_RESOLVED.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
